titleStmt.title: SII 25.171: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 171. (A.R. No. 171 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.

This epigraph is engraved in continuation of the previous inscription (No. 170 of 1908). The details of the date of the record viz., year 3, Mithuṉa 8, Thursday and Uttiram reqularly correspond to 1121 A.D., May 26. In the absence of the regular praśasti, this record may be assigned to about the 12th century A.D., on grounds of palaeography.

It records the sale of 37 vēli of lands as tirunāmattukkāṇi, for 700 kāśu received from the temple. The mahāsabhai of Tirunaṟaiyūr alias Pañchavanmādēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu is stated to have met at Eḻunūṟṟuvaṉ and made over the lands as iṟaiyili, transacted in favour of Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēvar of the temple of Aḻagiya Siddhīśvaram-uḍaiyūr of the village, for they spent in excess of the maravinda-kāśu (a tax payable to the king) and could not impose additional tax on the village, for the deficit of amount incurred by them. Among the boundaries of the lands thus sold for this reason, are mentioned the area to the east of the vadi through which the car (temple car) proceeds and to the north of Rājēndran-vāykkāl. The document was attested by Kēśava-bhaṭṭan, Kēśavan and Mādhavan.
A similar transaction is mentioned in the previous record. (A.R.Ep., 1908, No. 170).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī vikramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 munṟāvatu mitunanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ kulo
ttuṅka coḻa vaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūrākiya pañcavanmātevic caruppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Iṟṟai nāḷāl dhanmiceytu Eḻunūṟṟuvan Aracile kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu nammur Aḻakiya cittiyiśvaramuṭaiya
mahādevar Āticaṇṭeśvara devaṟkku śandrātitavarai Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭutta paricāvatu . nammur yāṇṭu 3 munṟāvatu maravinta kācukku mel Ēṟṟamāka sabhā viniyokamāka Aḻintamaiyil Uṭallilāta kācukku Ūril maravintu varikkoḷḷa voṇ
ṇāmaiyil Ikkācukku Uṭalāka It tevarkku Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu . terpoku vatikkuk kiḻakku rājentran vāykkālukku vaṭakku nālāṅkaṇṇāṟu 1 catirattu vācciyan cittan śrīvāsudevanun tampi mārummāka dānattāl peṟṟuṭaiyarāy Ittevaru �y In
ta viḷainilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai kāśyapan tiruveṅkaṭavan ponmalai Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku meṟkkun tenpāṟkellai meṟpaṭiyār nilattukku vaṭakkum meṟpārkkellai terupoku vatikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvi
cainta peruṉānkellai naṭuvipaṭṭa rūpāy 3 10 7 veliyum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟu paṟṟikkoṇṭa kācu 7 100 yikācu Eḻunūṟṟukkum Innilamuppattu Eḻuveliyum yitevaṟku tirunāmattu kāṇiyaāka kalveṭṭi kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom mahāsabhai paṇiyāl kecavapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku mātavan Eḻuttu keśavan Eḻu[ttu .*]
Digital edition of SII 25.171 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
